scene: A relaxed doodle stick figure lounging back in a hammock wearing sunglasses with a cool drink, totally chill, while a wall clock behind has its hands spinning in a fast blurry motion. Flat sunny warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A bored doodle stick figure slumped at an office desk, chin propped on one hand, staring up at a wall clock whose hands barely move, a few tiny motion lines showing how slow. Flat dull grey-blue office background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Close on a doodle stick figure face with wide eyes locked onto a big wall clock, the clock hands almost frozen in place, a single bored sweat drop. Flat muted blue background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A big wall clock with a tiny doodle stick figure desperately pushing the minute hand forward with both arms, but it barely budges. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
